violations.description: Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed using same pair of single-use gloves for more than one task. Observed food employee touching personal items, clothing, with gloves on and did not change her gloves. Gloves should be changed when switching tasks.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Coffee bar counter and donut case counter were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Clean utensils, scoops and knives, were found stored in dirty drawers. Clean equipment should be stored in a clean location.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Beverage to go lids were found stored in a dirty location. Single use items should be stored in a clean location.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Sandwich display cooler shelving units were found dirty. Donut display ledge also found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
